---
title: "Segmentation: clustering"
author:
  - Norah Jones
  - Bill Gates
  - Luis Francisco Gomez
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    code-fold: true
    embed-resources: true 
---

```{r}
#| label: load-r-libraries
#| message: false
#| warning: false
library(tidyverse)
library(skimr)
```

# Introduction

Pending

# Import data

Pending

```{r}
#| label: import-data
#| message: false
segmentation <- read_csv(
  file = "../000_data/005_data_set_chapter-5.csv"
) |> 
  select(-Segment)
```

# Transform data

Pending

```{r}
segmentation <- segmentation |> 
  mutate(
    gender = factor(x = gender, ordered = FALSE),
    kids = as.integer(x = kids),
    ownHome = factor(x = ownHome, ordered = FALSE),
    subscribe = factor(x = subscribe, ordered = FALSE)
  )
```

# Summarize data

Pending

```{r}
segmentation |> 
  skim()
```
